commands.review_summary:
The PR updates `Package.resolved` to Kingfisher 8.10.0, updates `pnpm-lock.yaml` so `tsx` resolves esbuild 0.28.1 and matching platform packages, and adds unreleased changelog entries.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is dependency maintenance rather than a bug report. The PR body provides a focused verification path for the changed runtime and tooling surfaces.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No repair lane is needed because the PR has no actionable code finding; it needs normal maintainer merge after CI.

target.title: build: refresh Kingfisher and esbuild
target.body:
## Summary

- Resolve Kingfisher 8.10.0, picking up asynchronous cancellation fixes and the macOS indexed-color-space decoding crash fix.
- Resolve esbuild 0.28.1 under `tsx`, fixing [GHSA-gv7w-rqvm-qjhr](https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-gv7w-rqvm-qjhr) and [GHSA-g7r4-m6w7-qqqr](https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-g7r4-m6w7-qqqr).
- Keep package manifests and version ranges unchanged; this is lockfile-only dependency maintenance plus changelog entries.

## Freshness audit

- SwiftPM: all 11 direct repositories are active and unarchived. Kingfisher was selected as the bounded runtime update. Sparkle 2.9.3, swift-log 1.13.2, AppAuth 2.1.0, Apollo iOS 2.1.2, and GRDB 7.11.0 remain separate runtime candidates; swift-markdown 0.8.0 is a pre-1.0 minor boundary and was not combined.
- pnpm: all direct dependencies are current except Commander 15, a major. pnpm 11 is also a major toolchain update. Both are intentionally deferred.
- Actions: setup-node 6.4.0 is current; setup-xcode's `v1` channel resolves to current v1.7.0. checkout 6.0.3 is a low-urgency patch focused on SHA-256 repositories and was not mixed into this runtime/security update.
- Toolchains: Swift 6.3.2, Node 24 LTS, and Xcode 26.5 are newer upstream releases. RepoBar retains its Swift 6.2 / Node 22 compatibility floors; the current `macos-latest` runner image only offers Xcode through 26.3, while Xcode 26.6 is still RC.

## Verification

- `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile`
- `pnpm audit --audit-level low` (0 advisories)
- `pnpm ghrest --help`
- `pnpm ghql --help`
- `pnpm check` (SwiftFormat, SwiftLint, 624 tests)
- `pnpm build`
- Focused cache suite: 10/10 passes after one unrelated, non-reproducible full-suite timestamp flake; the subsequent full suite passed.
- Exact packaged branch app: rapidly switched avatar-bearing repository submenus; avatars remained populated and the process stayed alive.
- Autoreview: clean for both dependency deltas.
- Public Model Identifier Gate: PASS across the exact diff, tests/fixtures/workflows, built app, and cropped UI proof.

## Risk and recommendation

Risk is low. Kingfisher is the only runtime change and has direct live UI proof; esbuild is development-only and the lockfile platform updates are mechanical. Recommend landing after green CI, then deleting the branch.
